title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahindra Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
